name: Shadow Ghost
description: A spectral figure wreathed in darkness, barely visible except for glowing eyes. Its touch drains the warmth from living flesh.

attacks.name: Chilling Touch
attacks.description: An icy spectral hand that drains life force

special_abilities.name: Incorporeal
special_abilities.description: Takes half damage from non-magical physical attacks

special_abilities.name: Life Drain
special_abilities.description: Heals 1 HP when damaging a living creature

behavior.notes: Moves directly toward player, ignoring obstacles. Relentless pursuit.
